ogTitle: Fine Flower vs Fingal Head: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fine Flower and Fingal Head.
heading: Fine Flower vs Fingal Head — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fine Flower, New South Wales and Fingal Head, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fingal Head has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Fine Flower (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fine Flower or Fingal Head safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fine Flower has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Fingal Head scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fine Flower scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Fingal Head scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fine Flower or Fingal Head?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fingal Head has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
